title: zuwa` #2111
definition:
1) to tremble, quiver, quake, be in terror
    1a) (Qal) to tremble, quake
    1b) (Pilpel)
        1b1) to shake violently
        1b2) to cause to tremble
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal) to tremble, quake
    1b) (Pilpel)

    NASB:  to tremble, quake
